title: Cheirodendron platyphyllum
taxonomy: Cheirodendron platyphyllum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant is native to Central and South America. It belongs to the genus Cheirodendron, which is a small group of evergreen trees and shrubs. The Lauraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the laurel family. Members of this family are often found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
